title: Run-local idea ledger
premise: A flat CSV can track ideas without a database or UI.
update_policy: Keep candidate_validated_once unless new evidence rows prove a completed downstream handoff or implementation test. Do not change to promoted from this ledger alone.
next_test: Repeat handoff with this v2 ledger only after adding a real new evidence row, or promote schema documentation if template work starts.
main_risk: Schema may duplicate 07_ideas.md or permit unsupported status upgrades.
status_update_reason: Both providers preserved status because no new evidence rows were present.

title: Manual provider debate before debate_ideas.py
premise: Automating debate is justified only after manual provider_router debate repeats.
update_policy: Keep deferred_until_repeated_manual_debate unless new evidence rows show at least two manual provider debates with repeated friction. Do not promote only because the idea sounds useful.
next_test: Run one more manual provider_router debate after update-policy test.
status_update_reason: Both providers preserved status because no repeated debate evidence exists.

title: Score fields inside idea ledger
premise: Scorecard dimensions may belong in ledger columns before a separate scorecard artifact exists.
update_policy: Keep candidate_modified unless new evidence rows show score fields changed an implementation or rejection decision. Do not create a separate scorecard template from this row alone.
next_test: Test score columns only after update_policy prevents status inflation.
status_update_reason: Both providers preserved status; score fields remain secondary.

title: Pipeline report markdown table
premise: A report may help only after multiple idea runs exist.
update_policy: Keep deferred unless new evidence rows show at least three completed idea runs and recurring visibility friction. Do not promote from this ledger alone.
next_test: Wait until at least three idea runs exist.
main_risk: Report can duplicate validate_run and run artifacts.
status_update_reason: Both providers preserved status; prerequisite is still unmet.

title: Change brief generator from snapshot diffs
premise: Snapshot diffs can seed future idea or research runs, but need a second snapshot first.
update_policy: Keep deferred unless new evidence rows include a second snapshot and a manually useful change brief. Do not promote from source-watching potential alone.
next_test: Take a second snapshot and manually create one change brief before scripting.
status_update_reason: Both providers preserved status; prerequisite is still unmet.

title: Discussion import from Markdown transcript
premise: Parsing transcripts into ledger rows risks brittle parsing and weak evidence discipline.
update_policy: Keep stopped unless new evidence rows show a stable transcript format and successful manual extraction. Do not change status from stopped based on convenience.
next_test: Do not implement; manually distill discussion into evidence rows first.
